parts.instruction: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

questions.prompt:
You hear two friends discussing the topic of marketing.

Which aspect of college publicity material do the friends disagree about?

options.label: how useful the environmental rating system is
how well the different courses are described
how visually attractive the brochures are

questions.explanation: Họ bất đồng về mức độ hữu ích của hệ thống đánh giá môi trường.

questions.prompt:
You hear two friends discussing the topic of marketing.

In the woman's opinion, companies link themselves with charities in order to

options.label: distract attention away from other issues.

questions.explanation: Cô ấy cho rằng công ty làm vậy để cải thiện hình ảnh.

questions.prompt:
You hear two friends talking about ways of keeping fit.

What is the woman's criticism of exercising in gyms?

options.label: Members get limited access to the facilities.
The membership cost is too high for the services offered.
It encourages exercise habits that lead to unhealthy lifestyles.

questions.explanation: Cô ấy phê phán thói quen tập luyện ở phòng gym dẫn đến lối sống không lành mạnh.

questions.prompt:
You hear two friends talking about ways of keeping fit.

How does the man respond to his friend's criticism?

options.label: He objects to her making sweeping generalisations about gyms.
He questions the value of excessive gym attendance.
He suspects she'd enjoy a different type of gym.

questions.explanation: Anh ấy phản đối việc cô ấy khái quát hóa về phòng gym.

questions.prompt:
You hear a woman telling a friend about living in her capital city as a student.

What is she doing during the conversation?

options.label: admitting to regrets about her choice of place to study
complaining about challenges she's had to face
expressing her admiration for people in the city

questions.explanation: Cô ấy bày tỏ sự ngưỡng mộ với người dân thành phố.

questions.prompt:
You hear a woman telling a friend about living in her capital city as a student.

Why does the man give the example of trees?

options.label: to present a counter-argument to hers
to express a reservation about her interpretation

questions.explanation: Ví dụ về cây được dùng để ủng hộ quan điểm chính của cô ấy.

parts.instruction: You will hear a student called Josh Brady talking about visiting South Africa as part of his university course in botany. For questions 7–14, complete the sentences with a word or short phrase.

questions.prompt: As well as his research project, Josh planned to write a … for a website while he was in Africa.
questions.explanation: Josh dự định viết một bài report cho website.

questions.prompt: Josh's group planned to check out a particular region after a … that had occurred there.
questions.explanation: Nhóm đi khảo sát sau một vụ cháy.

questions.prompt: Josh was surprised to see … being grown in the first area they visited.
questions.explanation: Anh ấy ngạc nhiên thấy trà đỏ được trồng ở đó.

questions.prompt: Josh describes the vehicle they travelled in as a … when they went in search of specimens.
questions.explanation: Họ đi tìm mẫu vật bằng xe safari truck.

questions.prompt: Josh uses the word … to give us an idea of the shape of the leaves he found.
questions.explanation: Lá có hình dạng giống kim (needle).

questions.prompt: Josh was particularly impressed by one type of flower which was … in colour.
questions.explanation: Một loài hoa có màu cam đậm.

questions.prompt: Josh uses the word … to convey his feelings about an area of vegetation he studied.
questions.explanation: Anh ấy mô tả khu thực vật như một paradise.

questions.prompt: Josh really appreciated the view he got from the … of his accommodation.
questions.explanation: Tầm nhìn từ mái nhà nơi ở.

parts.instruction: You will hear an interview in which two journalists called Jenny Langdon and Peter Sharples are talking about their work. For questions 15–20, choose the answer (A, B, C or D) which fits best according to what you hear.

questions.prompt: What does Jenny say about the story which made her name?

options.label: She'd been on the lookout for just such a lucky break.
She resented colleagues trying to take the credit for it.
She wasn't actually responsible for the finished article.
She asked for a more prestigious job on the strength of it.

questions.explanation: Jenny nói cô không phải người hoàn thiện bài báo đó.

questions.prompt: What does Jenny suggest about the editor she worked for on her first national daily newspaper?

options.label: He respected her for standing up to him.
He tended to blame her for things unfairly.
He wasn't as unreasonable as everyone says.
He taught her the value of constructive criticism.

questions.explanation: Cô ấy cho rằng biên tập viên hay đổ lỗi oan cho cô.

questions.prompt: When Jenny got her own daily column on the newspaper, she felt

options.label: satisfied that the good work she'd done elsewhere had been recognised.
relieved that it was only likely to be a short-term appointment.
determined to prove exactly what she was capable of.
unsure of her ability to make a success of it.

questions.explanation: Cô quyết tâm chứng minh khả năng của mình.

questions.prompt: Peter thinks he got a job on Carp Magazine thanks to

options.label: his practical knowledge of everyday journalism.
his familiarity with the interests of its main target audience.
his understanding of how best to present himself at interview.

questions.explanation: Peter nhờ kinh nghiệm thực tế trong báo chí hàng ngày.

questions.prompt: Peter and Jenny agree that courses in journalism

options.label: need to be supplemented by first-hand experience.
are attractive because they lead to paid employment.
are of little value compared to working on a student newspaper.
provide an opportunity for writers to address contentious issues.

questions.explanation: Họ đồng ý khóa học cần bổ sung bằng kinh nghiệm thực tế.

questions.prompt: When asked about their novels, Peter and Jenny reveal

options.label: an ambition to gain recognition for their craft.
a desire to develop careers outside journalism.
a need to prove how versatile they are as writers.
a wish to keep their journalism fresh and appealing.

questions.explanation: Họ muốn viết tiểu thuyết để giữ báo chí luôn mới mẻ.

parts.instruction: You will hear five short extracts in which people are talking about changing their jobs.
parts.taskOneInstruction: For questions 21 – 25, choose from the list (A – H) the reason each speaker gives for changing job.
parts.taskTwoInstruction: For questions 26 – 30, choose from the list (A – H) what each speaker feels about their new job.

questions.prompt: Speaker 1
questions.explanation: Speaker 1 đổi việc vì thiếu cảm giác mục đích.

questions.prompt: Speaker 2
questions.explanation: Speaker 2 cần thêm thử thách.

questions.prompt: Speaker 3
questions.explanation: Speaker 3 đổi việc vì đồng nghiệp không thân thiện.

questions.prompt: Speaker 4
questions.explanation: Speaker 4 không có triển vọng thăng tiến.

questions.prompt: Speaker 5
questions.explanation: Speaker 5 đổi việc vì khối lượng công việc.

questions.prompt: Speaker 1

options.label: delighted by a change in lifestyle
relieved the initial uncertainty is over
glad to be helping other people
grateful for an increase in salary

questions.explanation: Speaker 1 nhẹ nhõm vì đã qua giai đoạn bất ổn ban đầu.

questions.prompt: Speaker 2

options.label: delighted by a change in lifestyle
relieved the initial uncertainty is over
glad to be helping other people
grateful for an increase in salary

questions.explanation: Speaker 2 vui vì thay đổi lối sống.

questions.prompt: Speaker 3

options.label: delighted by a change in lifestyle
relieved the initial uncertainty is over
glad to be helping other people
grateful for an increase in salary

questions.explanation: Speaker 3 vui vì được giúp đỡ người khác.

questions.prompt: Speaker 4

options.label: delighted by a change in lifestyle
relieved the initial uncertainty is over
glad to be helping other people
grateful for an increase in salary

questions.explanation: Speaker 4 hy vọng vào thành công tương lai.

questions.prompt: Speaker 5

options.label: delighted by a change in lifestyle
relieved the initial uncertainty is over
glad to be helping other people
grateful for an increase in salary

questions.explanation: Speaker 5 hạnh phúc vì cảm giác được kiểm soát.
